title: Prisma Cloud Remediation - AWS CloudTrail Is Not Integrated With CloudWatch Logs
content:
This playbook remediates the following Prisma Cloud AWS CloudTrail alerts.

Prisma Cloud policies remediated:

 - AWS CloudTrail Is Not Integrated With CloudWatch Logs

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (PrismaCloud, xsoar-supported).

Integrations/scripts used: AWS - CloudTrail, AWS - CloudWatchLogs, AWS - IAM, Sleep, aws-iam-attach-policy, aws-iam-create-policy, aws-iam-get-role, isError.
